design_philosophy: Premium minimalist logistics dashboard. No dark mode. High contrast, data-first layout. Functional authority with clean grids, generous white space, and crisp typography.

kpi_card.style: flat solid, 1px subtle border (#E5E7EB), no shadow by default, hover: shadow-sm, rounded-xl

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-8

sidebar.style: w-64 bg-[#F7F7F8] border-r border-gray-200 h-screen flex flex-col fixed left-0 top-0

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

data_visualization.guidelines: Minimalist charts. Hide axis lines where possible. Use #111111 for main lines, and semantic colors (green/red) only when indicating positive/negative performance. Sparklines in KPI cards should be simple stroke lines with no fill.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly enforce light mode. Do not add any dark mode toggle or styles.
Use a layout with a fixed left sidebar (w-64) and a main content area with sticky header.
Implement 8 KPI Cards at the top using a 4-column grid on large screens. Each card must have a main value, % variation badge, and a mini sparkline.
Implement the Advanced Fleet Table with filters, search, and efficiency progress bars.
Implement an AI Insights block that highlights automated recommendations (e.g. '3 vehicles consuming abnormally').
Implement Driver Behavior Analysis and Fleet Utilization blocks using Recharts.
Use standard Tailwind classes for styling following the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
